x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Control test results (sn_audit_control_test) provide the historical compliance evidence Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted audit preparation and gap analysis. Sufficient test volume and completion rate are prerequisites for meaningful AI audit insights.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Perform control testing via Audit Management. Target: 50+ control tests in the trailing 12 months with 70%+ completion rate. Now Assist GRC uses recent test history for AI audit preparation.
